case_title: SERGIO PORTELA VS. ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTELA, SERGIO AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED PER LOS ANGELES SHERIFF'S DEPT., AS OF 09/15/17, REMAINING AMOUNT TO SATISFY THIS WRIT: $821.23.(LOS ANGELES SHERIFF'S DEPT. RETAINED POSSESSION OF THE WRIT, ISSUED ON 12/28/16 PURSUANT TO CCP 263.7) AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTELA, SERGIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC. $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $24.39 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTELA, SERGIO AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTELA, SERGIO AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $29.69 ACCRUED INTEREST, $25.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMP SIGNED SERVED MAY-31-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SERGIO PORTELA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY PORTELA, SERGIO AS TO DEFENDANT ABM SECURITY SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
